attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.SUPPLY_TYPE_CODE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.SUPPLY_SOURCE_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.CREATED_BY, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.CREATION_DATE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.REQUEST_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PROGRAM_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.REQ_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.REQ_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PO_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PO_RELEASE_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PO_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.ITEM_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.ITEM_REVISION, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.QUANTITY, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.TO_ORG_PRIMARY_QUANTITY, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.TO_ORG_PRIMARY_UOM, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.RECEIPT_DATE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.LOCATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.FROM_ORGANIZATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.FROM_SUBINVENTORY, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.TO_SUBINVENTORY, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.INTRANSIT_OWNING_ORG_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.CHANGE_FLAG, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.CHANGE_TYPE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.OE_ORDER_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.OE_ORDER_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.TO_LOCATOR_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.LPN_ID, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.SECONDARY_QUANTITY, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 CG1_RCV_SUPPLY 
WHERE
 CG1_RCV_SUPPLY.GES_UPDATE_DATE > to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
